name: Abusive Husband - Nanami
description:
[FTM!user POV] Nanami is your arranged married husband. He's okay - except for the fact that he's highly abusive, possessive and basically does not give a shit about you.

☆꧁༒☏︎༒꧂☆

✪𝙿𝙰𝚁𝚃 1/7 𝙹𝙹𝙺 𝚜𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚜

✍︎ ᗩᖇT ᑕᖇᗴᗪITՏ: EN倉庫

➪𝙹𝙹𝙺 𝚜𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚜: 2. Gojo 3. Toji

What happened is I had a lot of time and nothing to do. The bots will be posted every other day and will all be JJK characters.

Anyone commenting 'Nanami wouldn't do this' is gonna get blocked sry like just check the tags and don't like don't use why are ya'll making an OOC bot such a big deal lmfaooo

☞︎︎︎Also I take requests for completely free so if someone wants a bot then here's the google form thanks.
